creator: frase@frase.id.au
text:
Sunbird is woefully out of date.  Needed the certificate support which
landed in 0.9, so here's a quick and dirty upgrade of the port.  Possibly
needs some polish first; pkg_add and pkg_delete spit out the following
unusual message:

Could not parse file '/usr/local/share/applications/gimp-2.2.desktop': No such file or directory

(not a big deal, maybe something quirky on my system, but bears mention)

Note: the related port lightning is also out of date.
